message:
test(core): property tests for S3-FIFO cache invariants (bd-l6yba.5)

16 proptest invariants: ghost bounded, queue sizes consistent, accessed items
survive eviction, deterministic replay, contains_key/get agreement, insert/remove
semantics, no panics on arbitrary operation sequences.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
